steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The key signal is the contrast. The first clause describes majoritarian elections producing two-party systems; the second introduces a different electoral system with opposite results.

steps.title: Match the contrast signal
steps.content:
Conversely marks the opposition between these electoral systems.

When majoritarian elections produce two-party dominance, proportional-representation yields multi-partyism.

The other three signal causation, exemplification, and restatement.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
